app_purpose: Demo e-commerce application for testing and automation practice with multiple user accounts exhibiting different behaviors and issues.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login form authenticates users with username and password credentials.

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Displays inventory of products available for purchase.

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Manages selected products and quantities before checkout.

features.name: Checkout
features.description: Processes purchase with shipping and payment information.

features.name: Product Details
features.description: Shows detailed information and specifications for individual products.

features.name: Product Sorting
features.description: Sorts product list by price, name, or other criteria.

features.name: User Logout
features.description: Terminates user session and returns to login page.

constraints: error_user receives error messages during operations
